headline: Sizing Up Applied Materials (AMAT) Valuation After A Sharp Pullback And Strong One Year Return
summary: Recent performance snapshot Applied Materials (AMAT) has seen mixed recent returns, with a 0.4% decline over the past day, a 5.6% drop over the past week, and a 14.6% pullback over the past month. See our latest analysis for Applied Materials. While the share price has eased recently, with a 30 day share price return of a 14.6% decline, momentum over longer periods is still positive, including a 90 day share price return of 28.7% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 134.5%.
